sections.paragraph: (“which God caused to be built”), [Jabneh], pr.n. of a town situated on the Mediterranean sea, taken from the Philistines by Uzziah, 2Ch 26:6 comp. Jos 15:46, LXX. Ἰαμνία, 1Ma_4:15 , and Ἰάμνει�α, 5:58 2Ma_12:8 . Strab. xvi. 2; Arab. يبنا Yebna, which name is now given to a village situated in the ruins of the ancient town.
